title: Automation - Move group to top of board when date arrives
excerpt:

posts.author: rossevotix (Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability each week to move a specific group to the top of a board.

The reasoning for this is we are using it as a timesheet board, and the group im moving to the top sets the current week. We then have another automation that duplicates a template group with dependancies on the group that contains the start of the week date.

I have to manually move this back to the top of the board every week, ideally id like to pin the group to the top so I dont need an automation.

posts.author: zivencrist (Ziven)
posts.cookedHtml:
I 100% second this. This would be massively impactful when working with boards with recurring/time-triggered automations and multiple clients/accounts.

Because the only way to sort items within a board without picking a specific board is to move them to the “Top Group”, this would make item sorting much easier on an ongoing basis as well.
